case_title: DARYL DE VAN HORNE VS. JOHNSON SECURITY & PROTECTION, LLC, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DE VAN HORNE, DARYL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE VAN HORNE, DARYL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON SECURITY & PROTECTION, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $8,817.00 PRINCIPAL, $132.98 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,129.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE VAN HORNE, DARYL AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON SECURITY & PROTECTION, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
